title: Build SAID Raya Trip 2026 family event management application

requirements.text: Implement minimal Raya theme design system with soft cream background (#FAF9F6), emerald green primary color (#0F5132), soft gold accent (#C6A75E), clean modern sans-serif typography, elegant minimal spacious layout, and mobile responsive design with smooth subtle animations

quotes: Smooth and subtle animations (no flashy effects)

acceptanceCriteria: Background color is #FAF9F6 throughout the application
Primary interactive elements use #0F5132 emerald green
Accent elements use #C6A75E soft gold
Typography uses clean modern sans-serif fonts
Layout is spacious with adequate whitespace
Application is fully responsive on mobile devices
Animations are smooth and subtle without flashy effects
Thin gold divider line appears under header

requirements.text: Create top navigation bar with three tabs: 'Daftar Keluarga', 'Summary Raya', and 'Admin Dashboard' (admin only), with smooth fade transitions between tabs and thin gold divider line under header

quotes: Top navigation: Daftar Keluarga, Summary Raya, Admin Dashboard (admin only)
Thin gold divider line under header

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar displays three tabs horizontally
Tab labels are 'Daftar Keluarga', 'Summary Raya', and 'Admin Dashboard'
Admin Dashboard tab only visible when user is authenticated as admin
Clicking tabs triggers smooth fade transition between content sections
Thin gold line divider appears immediately below navigation bar

requirements.text: Build Daftar Keluarga tab with centered card layout (max width 600px) containing family registration form with required fields: Nama Keluarga (text), Makanan Yang Akan Dibawa (text), and Bilangan Ahli Hadir (dropdown 1-20)

quotes: Create a centered card layout (max width 600px)

acceptanceCriteria: Form card is centered on page with maximum width of 600px
Nama Keluarga field is a required text input
Makanan Yang Akan Dibawa field is a required text input
Bilangan Ahli Hadir is a required dropdown with options 1 through 20
All fields display required validation indicators

requirements.text: Implement dynamic member name fields in Daftar Keluarga form that appear with smooth slide-down animation when Bilangan Ahli Hadir is selected, generating text input fields labeled 'Nama Ahli 1', 'Nama Ahli 2', etc., with fade-in stagger animation (0.08s delay each) and all fields required

quotes: When bilangan ahli is selected: Smooth slide-down animation
Dynamically generate required text input fields: Nama Ahli 1, Nama Ahli 2, etc.
Each input field appears with fade-in stagger animation (0.08s delay each)

acceptanceCriteria: When user selects number in Bilangan Ahli Hadir dropdown, corresponding number of name input fields appear
Container animates with smooth slide-down motion
Each name field is labeled sequentially: 'Nama Ahli 1', 'Nama Ahli 2', etc.
Each field appears with fade-in animation staggered by 0.08 seconds
All dynamically generated name fields are required
Changing the number updates the displayed fields accordingly

requirements.text: Create backend database table 'family_raya' with fields: nama_keluarga (text), makanan (text), ahli_keluarga (array of names), and created_at (timestamp)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend defines stable storage for family_raya records
Each record contains nama_keluarga as text
Each record contains makanan as text
Each record contains ahli_keluarga as array of text strings
Each record contains created_at timestamp automatically set on creation

requirements.text: Implement form submission in Daftar Keluarga that shows loading spinner on submit button, saves family data to family_raya table, validates all required fields, and displays success message 'Data berjaya disimpan.' after successful save

quotes: Show simple success message: 'Data berjaya disimpan.'

acceptanceCriteria: Submit button displays loading spinner during submission
Form validates that all required fields are filled before submission
Family data is saved to backend family_raya table
Success message 'Data berjaya disimpan.' appears after successful save
Form resets after successful submission

requirements.text: Build Summary Raya tab with animated total attendees counter that counts up from 0 to total number of all ahli with 1 second duration

quotes: Count-up animation from 0 to total number of all ahli

acceptanceCriteria: Counter displays prominently on Summary Raya tab
Animation starts from 0 and counts up to current total of all ahli
Animation duration is exactly 1 second
Counter updates when new families are added

requirements.text: Create statistic cards section in Summary Raya displaying: Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, and Keluarga Paling Ramai, with fade-in animation, slight hover lift effect, and soft shadow

quotes: Statistic Cards: Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, Keluarga Paling Ramai
Cards should: Fade-in animation, Slight hover lift effect, Soft shadow

acceptanceCriteria: Four statistic cards are displayed in Summary Raya
Cards show: Total Orang (total attendees), Total Keluarga (total families), Total Jenis Makanan (unique food types), Keluarga Paling Ramai (family with most members)
Cards animate in with fade-in effect on load
Cards have soft shadow styling
Cards lift slightly on hover interaction

requirements.text: Implement backend query functions to calculate and return: total number of attendees, total number of families, total unique food types, and family with most members for Summary Raya statistics
acceptanceCriteria: Backend function returns total count of all ahli across all families
Backend function returns total count of registered families
Backend function returns count of unique food types
Backend function identifies and returns family with highest ahli count
All statistics update in real-time when data changes

requirements.text: Create family cards layout in Summary Raya displaying each family with: Nama Keluarga, Total ahli, Makanan, and list of ahli names, with real-time updates

quotes: Family Cards Layout: For each family show: Nama Keluarga, Total ahli, Makanan, List of ahli names

acceptanceCriteria: Each registered family displays as a card in Summary Raya
Card shows family name prominently
Card displays total number of members
Card shows food item being brought
Card lists all member names
Cards update automatically when new families register

requirements.text: Implement charts section in Summary Raya with pie chart showing food distribution and bar chart showing number of attendees per family, both with smooth fade-in animations

quotes: Bar Chart: Number of attendees per family

acceptanceCriteria: Pie chart visualizes distribution of food items across families
Bar chart displays number of attendees for each family
Both charts animate in with smooth fade effect
Charts are responsive and properly sized
Charts update when data changes

requirements.text: Create secure admin authentication system with login page and protect admin routes so only authenticated admin users can access Admin Dashboard and perform admin operations (edit, delete, reset, export)

quotes: Only admin can: Access Admin Dashboard, Edit family entries, Delete entries, Reset database, Export Excel reports

acceptanceCriteria: Admin login page with authentication form exists
Backend validates admin credentials securely
Admin Dashboard route is protected and only accessible when authenticated
Non-admin users cannot access admin-only features
Admin session persists appropriately
Logout functionality exists for admin users

requirements.text: Build Admin Dashboard with editable data table displaying all families, search and filter functionality by family name, delete confirmation modal, and reset database confirmation modal

quotes: Editable data table of all families

acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard displays table with all family records
Table rows are editable in place
Search input filters families by name in real-time
Delete button on each row opens confirmation modal before deletion
Reset database button opens confirmation modal before resetting all data
All modals have clear confirm/cancel options

requirements.text: Implement backend functions for admin operations: update family record, delete family record, and reset entire family_raya database
acceptanceCriteria: Backend function updates existing family record with new data
Backend function deletes specified family record
Backend function clears all records from family_raya table
All operations are protected and only callable by authenticated admin

requirements.text: Create Excel export feature with 'Export Full Report' button that generates SAID_Raya_Trip_2026_Full_Report.xlsx containing three sheets: Sheet 1 'Raw Data' with columns Nama Keluarga, Nama Ahli, Makanan (one row per ahli); Sheet 2 'Summary' with Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, Keluarga Paling Ramai; Sheet 3 'Makanan Breakdown' with Makanan and Bilangan Keluarga Membawa columns

quotes: Sheet 1: Raw Data Columns: Nama Keluarga, Nama Ahli, Makanan (Each ahli must be one row)
Sheet 2: Summary Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, Keluarga Paling Ramai
Sheet 3: Makanan Breakdown Makanan, Bilangan Keluarga Membawa
Ensure proper formatting and clean table layout

acceptanceCriteria: Export Full Report button is visible in Admin Dashboard
Clicking button generates Excel file named SAID_Raya_Trip_2026_Full_Report.xlsx
Sheet 1 contains raw data with each family member as separate row showing family name, member name, and food
Sheet 2 contains summary statistics: total people, total families, total food types, family with most members
Sheet 3 contains food breakdown showing each unique food item and count of families bringing it
All sheets have clean formatting with proper column headers and data alignment
File downloads automatically to user's device

requirements.text: Implement real-time data synchronization across all views (Daftar Keluarga, Summary Raya, Admin Dashboard) so changes are reflected immediately without manual refresh
acceptanceCriteria: When new family is registered, Summary Raya updates automatically
When admin edits or deletes family, all views update immediately
Statistics and charts refresh automatically when data changes
No manual page refresh needed to see latest data

constraints: Use only React, Tailwind CSS, and React Query for frontend
Backend must use Motoko in single-actor architecture
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
All animations must be smooth and subtle without flashy effects
Admin routes must be securely protected
nonGoals: Support for multiple languages beyond the provided Malay labels
User registration system for non-admin family members
Photo uploads for families or food items
Social media integration or sharing features
Calendar or date management for the event
Multiple admin roles or permission levels
